collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `activite_objectif`.*, `activite_sportive`.`nom` as `activite_nom`, `activite_sportive`.`calories_brulees_par_heure`, (activite_sportive.calories_brulees_par_heure * activite_objectif.duree_minutes_par_seance / 60) as calories_par_seance, (activite_sportive.calories_brulees_par_heure * activite_objectif.duree_minutes_par_seance / 60 * activite_objectif.frequence_par_semaine) as calories_par_semaine FROM `activite_objectif` JOIN `activite_sportive` ON `activite_sportive`.`id` = `activite_objectif`.`activite_id` WHERE `activite_objectif`.`objectif_id` = 1

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `activite_objectif`.*, `activite_sportive`.`nom` as `activite_nom`, `activite_sportive`.`calories_brulees_par_heure`, (activite_sportive.calories_brulees_par_heure * activite_objectif.duree_minutes_par_seance / 60) as calories_par_seance, (activite_sportive.calories_brulees_par_heure * activite_objectif.duree_minutes_par_seance / 60 * activite_objectif.frequence_par_semaine) as calories_par_semaine FROM `activite_objectif` JOIN `activite_sportive` ON `activite_sportive`.`id` = `activite_objectif`.`activite_id` WHERE `activite_objectif`.`objectif_id` = 1
